countries.title: Countries to Monitor
countries.description: List of country codes (DE, FR, AT, HU, CZ, SK, RO, PL, IT, ES, NL, BE, CH, SI, HR)

priceThreshold.title: Price Alert Threshold (EUR/MWh)
priceThreshold.description: Send email alert if any country's price exceeds this value

emailTo.title: Alert Email To
emailTo.description: Recipient email address for price alerts

emailFrom.title: Alert Email From
emailFrom.description: Sender email address (optional, defaults to gmailUser)

gmailUser.title: Gmail Username
gmailUser.description: Your Gmail address for SMTP authentication

gmailPass.title: Gmail App Password
gmailPass.description: Gmail app-specific password (not your regular password)
